text: The department shall administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter, and has authority to adopt rules pursuant to ss. 120.536 (1) and 120.54 to implement them.
markdown:
### Chapter 324. Fin. Responsibility
##### § 324.042 — Administration

The department shall administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter, and has authority to adopt rules pursuant to ss. 120.536 (1) and 120.54 to implement them.

subsections.text: The department shall administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter, and has authority to adopt rules pursuant to ss. 120.536 (1) and 120.54 to implement them.
